series_metadata.series_title: Non-cleanup related hazardous waste data validation documents
series_metadata.series_description: The Division of Hazardous Waste Management (DHWM)uses environmental data from a number of sources to support its decision-making processes. Data validation is a process that enables DHWM staff to review analytical data for consistency, quality and relevance before using it for making decisions. The records in this series do NOT include for matters escalated for enforcement. Those data validation records, if any, are a part of the case development record.
